name: @casys/shgat-tf-benchmark
description: ToolRet benchmark for SHGAT-TF (Option A: orthogonal projection, no training)

scripts.embed: cd .. && cd .. && cd .. && deno run --allow-all --config deno.json lib/shgat-tf/benchmark/scripts/embed-toolret.ts
scripts.prepare-data: npm run download && npm run embed
